My Scottish Journey

Whole-Class Mode

Classmates

South Lodge Primary
Good afternoon
South Lodge Primary

Needs Attention

Quick Actions

Curriculum Alignment

Level 1 — Early (P1, Ages 5-6)
Short words, counting to 20, simple addition/subtraction, basic reading
Level 2 — First (P2-P4, Ages 6-8)
Longer words, place value, multiplication introduction, paragraph comprehension
Level 3 — Second (P5-P7, Ages 8-10)
Complex spelling, all four operations, fractions, rich comprehension texts

Aligned to Scottish Curriculum for Excellence — Literacy & English and Numeracy & Mathematics.

Add Pupils

Class List

Class Progress Table

Click any column header to sort. Click a pupil name to see their full detail. Scroll horizontally on mobile.

Pupil Detail

Class Assignment

Set a class-wide assignment. It appears on every pupil's home screen when they log in.

Classroom Tools

📺
Whole-Class Mode
Project questions on the board
📄
Print Worksheet
Maths + spelling sheet
⏱
Session Timer
Timed practice sessions

Reports & Export

📊
Print Report
Full class progress report
📥
Export CSV
Spreadsheet download

Custom Quiz Builder

Create questions for pupils. They appear as "Teacher's Quiz" in the Challenges section.

School Details

Security

Session Timer

Set a practice timer. A notification shows when time is up.

Backup & Restore

Download one backup file for this device. Importing a backup replaces the current device data on this browser.

Data Management

Caution: these actions cannot be undone.

About

Version1.1
Content34 modes, 18 stories, 230+ words
SubjectsLiteracy, Numeracy, Geography
CurriculumScottish CfE (Early, First, Second)
DataLocal only, no internet required
